semantic.role: Document specifying naming convention rules for interfaces and test files in a monorepo.
responsibilities: Defines the 'I' prefix rule for internal TypeScript interfaces in src/types/**/*.ts.
Defines the .test.ts or .spec.ts suffix rule for test files under tests/.
Provides severity levels (Warning for interface rule, Error for test file rule) for tooling integration.
outOfScope: Naming conventions for variables, functions, classes, CSS, or other code elements.
Rules for non-TypeScript files (e.g., JavaScript, JSON).
Configuration details for test runners or linting tools.

English.purpose: To ensure a unified naming style across a large monorepo, reducing cognitive load and improving code readability and tool compatibility.
English.context_and_audience: This document is intended for all developers working in the ArchSpine monorepo who write TypeScript interfaces or test files. It serves as a concise reference for two specific naming rules that have been adopted to enforce consistency and streamline CI tooling.
key_takeaways: Internal interfaces in src/types/**/*.ts must be prefixed with 'I' (e.g., IUserRepository) – warning-level rule.
Test files under tests/ must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts – error-level rule.
These rules are part of a broader effort to maintain codebase harmony in a monorepo environment.
